# terrible_community_general_gitlab_instance_variable (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `purge` (Boolean) When set to `true`, delete all variables which are not mentioned in the task.
- `state` (String) Create or delete instance variable.
- `variables` (String) A list of dictionaries that represents CI/CD variables.

### Read-Only

- `instance_variable` (String) Four lists of the variablenames which were added, updated, removed or exist.
